title: South Coast Railway zone notified after a decade; HQ at Visakhapatnam, to start operations from June 1
description: India’s 18th railway zone, headquartered at Visakhapatnam, to be carved out of the existing East Coast Railway and South Central Railway from June 1, 2026; will integrate Guntakal, Guntur, Vijayawada and the new Visakhapatnam division
